title: P6 XER Baseline Mapping Authorization
objective: Author the smallest bounded integration-authority update needed to explicitly map baseline-bearing XER sources such as `BASELINEPROJECT` and `BL_PLAN`, distinguish current-plan versus baseline-plan semantics, and authorize how baseline schedule truth may enter the PM schedule lane without landing any SQL, loader, bridge, or UI changes.
constrained_outputs: One bounded revision or companion authority note clarifying which XER entities and fields carry baseline schedule truth
Explicit current-plan versus baseline-plan mapping semantics for later persisted ingestion
No SQL, no loader changes, no bridge changes, and no UI changes
validation_steps: Confirm packet 020b stays bounded to XER baseline mapping authority and does not land SQL, loader logic, bridge routes, or UI code
Confirm the mapping distinguishes current plan from baseline plan without overloading existing planned_start and planned_finish semantics
Confirm the packet only authorizes later ingestion and does not silently create persistence or runtime consumers
sql_permission_note: Packet 020b is integration-authority only. No SQL, migration edits, loader changes, bridge changes, or UI implementation are authorized.
